<insights>

- The zone forms a clean vertical slice: detector service → hook → UI component, with full unit-test coverage for each layer.
- The bidirectional import relationship with web-viewer (crash → web-viewer and web-viewer → crash) is a documented architectural bypass; crash imports web-shared directly rather than through web-viewer to avoid dependency inversion.
- The crash/index.ts entrypoint acts as a zone barrel, keeping external consumers from reaching into internal modules — a pattern worth maintaining as the zone grows.
- Zone "crash" has files across 5 directories — consider consolidating under a dedicated directory

- Bidirectional coupling with web-viewer (2 imports each direction) is an acknowledged architectural exception documented in CLAUDE.md; ensure new crash zone additions continue to follow the two-consumer rule before cohesion degrades.
